text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious little squirrel named Sparkleshine. She loved exploring the forest more than anything else. On the day Sparkleshine discovered something special, it changed her forever.

She was sniffing around the roots of an ancient oak tree when she stumbled upon an old locket hanging loosely from a twig. Being curious, she pulled it open. Inside was nothing ordinary—an old-fashioned photograph of a woman waving frantically. Sparkleshine waved back eagerly.

Days turned into weeks, and Sparkleshine visited the oak often, poring over the photo. It showed a lady in white standing amidst colorful flowers. One day, as she watched the sunset dipping behind the trees, twinkling stars appeared. The lady smiled mysteriously.

Sparkleshine copied the gesture, feeling a strange connection. She decided she must find this lady. One night, she scaled down a rope hanging from the tree and found her—Mrs. Whisperwind.

Mrs. Whisperwind explained she lived
